sn4.9:1.1: Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Rājagaha in the Bamboo Grove, the Squirrel Sanctuary. There the Blessed One addressed the bhikkhus thus: "Bhikkhus!"
sn4.9:1.2: "Venerable sir!" those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
sn4.9:2.1: "Bhikkhus, this life span of human beings is short. One has to go on to the future life. One should do what is wholesome and lead the holy life; for one who has taken birth there is no avoiding death. One who lives long, bhikkhus, lives a hundred years or a little longer."
sn4.9:3.1: Then Māra the Evil One approached the Blessed One and addressed him in verse:
sn4.9:6.1: Then Māra the Evil One … disappeared right there.
